## Type
<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change with no behaviour change
- [ ] `style` — UI / visual only
- [ ] `chore` — deps, config, tooling

## What changed
<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR do and why? -->


## Test plan
<!-- How did you verify this works? Steps to reproduce the before/after, or a short checklist -->
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] Tested in browser — golden path works
- [ ] No new console errors or warnings
- [ ] Auth flow unaffected (login → app → logout)
- [ ] Responsive — checked at mobile width
